name: @seameet/mcp
description: MCP server for SeaMeet — let AI agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor) start/stop recordings, take screenshots, read live transcripts, and search meeting summaries on your desktop.
author: Seasalt.ai <support@seasalt.ai> (https://seasalt.ai)

scripts.build:mcpb: npx -y @anthropic-ai/mcpb validate manifest.json && npx -y @anthropic-ai/mcpb pack . dist/seameet.mcpb
